Page ICM Data Transf. Pack. Filters - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the field caption of the field on which you want to filter records in the data transfer table.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transf. Pack. Filters - Control Field Caption - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the field filter value for a data transfer package filter. By setting a value, you specify that only records with that value are included in the data transfer package.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transf. Pack. Filters - Control Field Filter - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the ID of the field on which you want to filter records in the data transfer table.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transf. Pack. Filters - Control Field ID - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the field on which you want to filter records in the data transfer table.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transf. Pack. Filters - Control Field Name - Property ToolTip
